footer.line1: LB Relief is a volunteer initiative focused on private, dignified support.

home.heroTitle: Support for displaced families in Lebanon
home.heroSubtitle: Request help, offer housing, or support families with donations
home.lead: Following the recent conflict, families across Lebanon have been affected, with the most severe impact felt in the South and in parts of Beirut. Many communities were forced to evacuate due to widespread bombardment and escalating insecurity. Thousands of families are now displaced, with many facing homelessness and the sudden loss of income. Immediate needs include safe shelter, food, clean water, blankets, hygiene supplies, and essential items for children and older adults.

directSupport.title: Direct emergency assistance
directSupport.description: Emergency support when families need immediate help covering essential costs.

foodParcels.title: Relief supplies and food parcels
foodParcels.description: Relief supply distribution when possible, including food parcels and essential items.

one.title: Requests are submitted privately
one.description: Families submit help requests through the official form. We collect only the minimum information needed for coordination.

two.title: Offers are reviewed
two.description: Housing and supply offers are reviewed privately. We do not publish phone numbers or addresses publicly.

three.title: Support is prioritized
three.description: Cases are prioritized based on urgency, vulnerability, and available resources.

four.title: Aid is coordinated and delivered
four.description: Support may include direct emergency assistance or relief supplies and food parcels when possible.

five.title: Updates are published
five.description: We publish transparency updates and summaries while protecting privacy and safety.

officialChannels.warning: Use only the official links listed on this website.

home.whatWeDoNotAskTitle: What we do not ask for

whatWeDoNotAsk.item3: No exact address required in the form.

home.whatWeCannotPromise: We review every request we receive, but support depends on urgency and available resources.

safety.antiFraud: We never request donations through private messages and we never ask for codes or passwords. Use only the official donation links on this website.

donate.title: Donate
donate.intro: Every contribution helps. Even 1 dollar can support a family in need.
donate.donateFromLebanonDescription: Local donations can be sent through Whish. You may send any amount that you are able to contribute.
whishInstructions: Send money to the official LB Relief Whish ID
donate.donateFromAbroadDescription: International donations can be made securely by card through our payment link.
donate.processingNotice: Donations from abroad are processed through a trusted volunteer partner based outside Lebanon due to payment platform availability.
donate.pending: Donation channel is being finalized. Please check back soon.

notes.directAid: Donations support two forms of assistance based on urgency and what is feasible on the ground: direct emergency financial assistance for essential needs and relief parcels or packages
notes.foodParcels: Relief supply distribution is done when possible, including food parcels, blankets, hygiene supplies, and other essential items.
notes.operatingCosts: Most donations are used for direct assistance and relief supplies. A limited portion may be used for essential operating costs required to deliver aid, including packaging materials, phone and mobile data, transportation and fuel, and platform processing fees. All operating costs are documented and reflected in transparency updates.
notes.volunteerRelief: If a volunteer involved in this initiative is also affected and requires assistance, it will be recorded and reported as a relief case using the same documentation and privacy standards applied to all beneficiaries.
notes.paymentNotice: This website does not collect or store payment information. Donations are processed through official third party platforms linked on this page.
notes.antiFraud: We never request donations through private messages. Donate only through the official links listed on this website.

requestHelp.title: Request Help
requestHelp.intro: If you or your family need assistance, submit a request through the official form. Requests are reviewed privately. We prioritize urgent cases and respond based on available resources. We cannot guarantee support for every request.
requestHelp.privacyDignity: We do not require photos. We do not require IDs. Do not share exact addresses or personal documents in the form. Share only the minimum information needed for coordination.
requestHelp.emergencyNote: If you are in immediate danger, seek local emergency assistance.
requestHelp.pending: Request form is being set up.

minimum.summary: We do not require photos or IDs. Share only the minimum information needed for coordination.

offerHelp.title: Offer Help
offerHelp.intro: If you can offer housing or physical donations such as blankets, mattresses, or essential supplies, submit an offer through the official form. Offers are reviewed privately. We do not publish addresses or phone numbers publicly.

notes.housingEthics: We prioritize free or reasonable cost housing and we do not accept crisis pricing or exploitative terms. We screen offers and contact providers to confirm details.
notes.physicalDonations: We coordinate drop off or pickup when feasible and safe.
notes.sanctuaries: Religious sanctuaries such as mosques, churches, and community spaces may also submit offers through the sanctuary form.

housing.title: Housing offers
housing.description: Submit housing offers through the official form.

inKind.title: Physical donations
inKind.description: Submit physical donation offers through the official form.

sanctuary.title: Sanctuaries
sanctuary.description: Submit sanctuary offers through the official form.

volunteer.title: Volunteer
volunteer.description: Join the volunteer team through the official form.

updates.title: Updates
updates.intro: More updates will be posted here.

launch.title: Update 001: Launch and how to request help
launch.body: LB Relief is a volunteer led initiative supporting displaced and affected families across Lebanon. We support families in two ways, based on urgency and what is feasible on the ground: direct emergency assistance for essential needs, and relief supplies and food parcels when possible. If you or your family need assistance, use the official Request Help form. If you can offer housing or physical items, use the official Offer Help forms. We do not require photos or IDs, and we do not publish addresses or phone numbers.

transparency.title: Transparency 001: How funds and deliveries are documented
transparency.body: We are committed to transparency while protecting dignity and safety. We publish updates as frequently as possible, including region level summaries, quantities of items delivered when available, and receipts or proof of purchase when possible with sensitive details removed. Operating costs and any volunteer relief support are documented and reflected in public summaries.

updates.moreSoon: More updates will be posted here.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.intro: We are committed to transparency while protecting dignity and safety.
transparency.publishingRhythm: We share updates as frequently as possible. We also publish periodic summaries that include totals and categories.

whatPublish.region: Distribution summaries with region level location.
whatPublish.quantities: Quantities of items delivered when available.
whatPublish.receipts: Receipts or proof of purchase when possible, with sensitive details removed.

transparency.privacyRules: We do not publish names, phone numbers, or exact addresses. We avoid identifiable images of beneficiaries and we avoid identifiable images of children.
transparency.operatingSupportTitle: Operational costs and volunteer hardship support
transparency.operatingSupport: See the operating cost and volunteer support statements on the Donate page. All such entries are documented and included in transparency summaries.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.statement: We collect only the minimum information needed to respond to messages and coordinate support. We do not sell personal data.

whatCollect.item1: Contact information and message content submitted through forms.

whatNotCollect.item2: IDs or proof photos as a requirement.

privacy.dataHandling: Access is limited to the admin team. Data is retained only as long as needed for coordination.

contact.title: Contact
contact.supportNote: If urgent, use the Request Help form.
contact.impersonationNote: If you see accounts collecting donations in our name outside the official links on this website, report it immediately.
